---
title: "<a href='tidbits.xml' class='rss-link'><i class='bi bi-rss'></i></a> /ˈtɪdbɪt/"
pagetitle: "/ˈtɪdbɪt/"
subtitle: "a small and particularly interesting item of information."
listing:
  contents: tidbits
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  feed: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <link rel="alternate" type="application/rss+xml" title="Research Tidbits" href="tidbits.xml">
---

::: {.mb-4}
Over the course of my PhD, I've found that my research seems to involve solving many tiny problems which have _some_ insight to offer but not enough to share in any usual platforms of scientific discourse. As an attempt to preserve these tidbits from fading into obscurity as I inevitably forget about them, I have begun documenting them here.
:::

<br>
